caption: A gray Dodge Challenger is parked on a paved surface against a backdrop of green grass and a light-colored sky. The car is viewed from a front-three-quarter angle, showcasing its hood scoop, dark rims, and headlights. Static on-screen text appears in every frame: "FOLLOW MODERN DAY MUSCLE" and "@modernday_muscle" accompanied by an Instagram logo are positioned in the upper left corner. On the right side of each frame, the text "DONT FORGET TO" sits above a red YouTube "Subscribe" button. Across all four frames, the car and the background remain completely stationary, and there are no people present. The scene does not change between frames, presenting a still image of the vehicle with promotional social media overlays.
